evals.prompt: Design a locator schema for persisting user highlights in a document reader.
evals.expected_output: The agent creates a multi-signal locator with position, text excerpt, chapter reference, and DOM fallback. Includes serialization format with stable casing.
assertions: The locator includes both position and text excerpt fields
The agent includes a chapter/section reference for stability
The agent mentions a fallback mechanism when primary locator fails

evals.prompt: Users report their highlights drift when the document is re-rendered. How do I fix annotation anchoring?
evals.expected_output: The agent implements multi-level re-anchoring: exact match -> fuzzy text -> chapter fallback -> user notice. Warns user when anchor degrades.
assertions: The agent implements a multi-level fallback re-anchoring strategy
The agent warns the user when falling back to degraded anchor
The agent addresses content change handling

evals.prompt: Implement event cleanup for a document reader component in React.
evals.expected_output: The agent implements cleanup in useEffect return, removes listeners on unmount, and prevents memory leaks from accumulated handlers.
assertions: The agent implements cleanup function in useEffect return
The agent removes event handlers on component unmount
The agent mentions preventing listener accumulation/memory leaks

evals.prompt: How do I lazy-load a large document in a web reader without blocking the UI?
evals.expected_output: The agent lazy-loads document assets, shows loading state, reuses single rendition instance, and handles progressive rendering.
assertions: The agent lazy-loads document assets rather than loading all at once
The agent shows a loading state during document fetch
The agent mentions reusing a single rendition instance

evals.prompt: Add telemetry for document load failures with trace IDs.
evals.expected_output: The agent logs error events with trace IDs, categorizes failure types, and shows user-friendly error messages.
assertions: The agent includes trace IDs in telemetry log entries
The agent categorizes document load failure types
The agent shows a user-friendly error notification on failure
